title: Title
doc_html:
PART VI.  REINSURANCE INTERMEDIARY

§1721.  Title

This Part may be cited as the "Reinsurance Intermediary Law".

Acts 1992, No. 811, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1210.20 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.

This Part may be cited as the "Reinsurance Intermediary Law".
